faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control services in Amityville typically range from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment required. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than regular ants (up to ½ inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. Key signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large winged ants indoors, especially in spring. Our technicians can accurately identify the species during an inspection.

faqs.question: Can carpenter ants cause structural damage to my Amityville home?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants excavate wood to build their nests, which can compromise the structural integrity of your home over time. They're particularly attracted to moisture-damaged wood, making older Amityville homes and those near the water especially vulnerable. Early detection and treatment are crucial to preventing expensive repairs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Amityville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Amityville locations, understanding that carpenter ant infestations require prompt attention. Our team will conduct a thorough inspection, identify entry points and nesting sites, and implement an effective treatment plan to eliminate the colony and prevent future infestations.
